economic_notes: First Nation has TFN Economic Development Corporation, Elite Bio-Centre Productions Inc., and Goganonganga Limited Partnership consolidated. Robinson Huron Treaty $10 billion settlement approved November 1, 2023. Landfill site estimated remaining useful life of one year with 25-year post-closure period. Land claim negotiations ongoing with $250,958 advanced by Canada.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to non-adoption of PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations - management has not completed assessment of tangible capital assets for potential AROs; impact cannot be quantified. First Nation also continued to follow PS 3270 Solid Waste Landfill Closure which was superseded. Three entities fully consolidated: TFN Economic Development Corporation, Elite Bio-Centre Productions Inc., and Goganonga Limited Partnership. Contingent liability to CMHC for housing renovation loans to band members. Robinson Huron Treaty Trust $10 billion settlement approved post year-end. Municipal tax dispute of ~$1,309,371 outstanding. Schedule of Remuneration referenced in cover letter but not included in provided text so remuneration figures unavailable. total_government_transfers includes Canada $4,226,218 and Ontario $558,001 only; Aboriginal organizations and OFN LP treated as non-government.
